description_long: This is a classic wooden wardrobe with a rectangular shape and a broad, overhanging top. The front features two vertically paneled doors, each adorned with ornate carved motifs, including decorative flourishes and what appear to be human figures. The doors are equipped with small round knobs for handles, and the lower section of each door has additional carved detailing. The sides and back are plain, with subtle wood grain and paneling visible, while the base is slightly raised on short feet. The finish is a medium brown wood tone with a smooth, semi-glossy surface, giving it a traditional and sturdy appearance. This wardrobe would be suitable for placement in urban settings such as entryways, garages, or even on sidewalks for temporary storage or donation.
description: A traditional, medium-brown wooden wardrobe with ornate carved doors and round knob handles, featuring a broad top and raised base. The front is richly detailed, while the sides and back are plain with visible wood grain.
description_view_0: The front view shows two intricately carved doors with decorative motifs and round knob handles, as well as the broad overhanging top and raised base.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain wooden panel with subtle vertical grain and no visible handles or carvings.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a flat, unadorned wooden back with horizontal and vertical panel lines, lacking any decorative features.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain wooden panel with visible grain and no handles or carvings.
